handlers.invalid: [pelela] Handler "{{name}}" defined in {{eventInfo}} is not a function of view model "{{viewModel}}".

properties.invalidType: [pelela] Property "{{name}}" used in {{kind}} must be {{expected}}, but found different type on view model "{{viewModel}}". Element: {{snippet}}
properties.validation: [pelela] Unknown property "{{name}}" used in {{kind}} on: {{snippet}}. Make sure your view model "{{viewModel}}" defines it.

registration.missing: [pelela] View model "{{name}}" is not registered. Did you call defineViewModel?

routing.componentNotRegistered: [pelela] Component "{{name}}" has no template registered. Did you call defineComponent?

compiler.missingRoot: Pelela template "{{filePath}}" must contain exactly one <pelela ...> or <component ...> as root.
compiler.multipleRoots: Pelela template "{{filePath}}" has {{count}} root tags. Only one is allowed.
compiler.missingClosingTag: Pelela template "{{filePath}}" has no corresponding closing tag.
compiler.unbalancedTags: Pelela template "{{filePath}}" has an unbalanced number of root tags.
compiler.foreignInterpolation: Pelela template "{{filePath}}" contains unsupported "{{...}}" syntax. PelelaJS does not allow expressions in views. Use regular quotes ("") instead.
compiler.foreignPropertyBinding: Pelela template "{{filePath}}" contains Angular-like property binding ("[...]=..."). PelelaJS does not support JS constructs in HTML. Pass static attributes and delegate logic to the ViewModel.
compiler.missingViewModel: Pelela template "{{filePath}}" must contain view-model="..." attribute
compiler.forbiddenRootAttribute: Pelela template "{{filePath}}": Attribute "{{attr}}" is not allowed on root tag <{{tagName}}>. Logic and binding attributes can only be used on internal elements or component invocations.
